input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IC.4.8.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ic.4.8.2
            TITLE: signals from any sensors must be sent directly to the bspd. outputs from other modules may

            CONTENT:
            rule IC.4.8.2: Signals from any sensors must be sent directly to the BSPD. Outputs from other modules may
IC.4.8.2 Signals from any sensors must be sent directly to the BSPD. Outputs from other modules may 
not be used in place of the raw sensor signals.

final_answer: Signals from any sensors must be sent directly to the BSPD. Outputs from other modules may not be used in place of the raw sensor signals.
